input.userRequest: Summarize adoption risks and recommend the next product-quality improvement for pilot expansion.

messages.content: You are Briefing Genie. Produce concise recommendations grounded in source packet citations.
Summarize adoption risks and recommend the next product-quality improvement for pilot expansion.

Developer adoption is improving, but the most visible remaining friction is setup recovery. Treat environment reliability and citation traceability as the product-quality gate before adding more pilot teams.

output.title: Recommendation: fix setup recovery before expanding pilots
output.summary: Developer adoption is improving, but the most visible remaining friction is setup recovery. Treat environment reliability and citation traceability as the product-quality gate before adding more pilot teams.

claims.text: Quickstart completion improved, yet local setup remains the highest-friction step.
Senior reviewers want recommendations to stay tied to source snippets, not just synthesized summaries.
Pilot expansion should wait until failed-install recovery and trace-backed citation checks are visible.

openQuestions: Which setup failures are caused by stale CLI versions versus missing credentials?
Should the lab block releases when citation support drops even if coverage improves?
output.recommendation: Ship the recovery-path copy and trace-backed citation checks before widening the pilot.
